publish.notes: Custom GPT publish is a UI flow on chatgpt.com: paste system instructions, upload knowledge files, paste OpenAPI action schema, set API-key auth. Re-evaluate when OpenAI ships one-click Workspace Agents migration (spec § Open Questions).

baked.description: Manifest of what the knowledge pack contains. Always copied verbatim.

kb_sources_pending.description: Allard Prize case study — pattern: AI watches a list and acts on moments.
MAS VC Chatbot case study — pattern: AI as a research partner grounded in your knowledge.
Klaus case study — pattern: AI as a thin layer on top of your tools, with persistent memory.
What a MAS AI engagement looks like — pro bono with invited donation, weeks not months.

live_retrieval.description: CCNDR — periodic scrape of ai.ccndr.ca, queried at conversation time. Not available in Custom GPT v1 (no per-turn retrieval beyond uploaded files).
live_retrieval.status: deferred — included as baked snapshot in v1 if needed; live retrieval not available on Custom GPT path.

auth.name: X-API-Key
auth.notes: Brian pastes the same shared API key the Vercel deployment validates. Custom GPT Builder stores it server-side; the Advisor never sees it.

operations.summary: Submit first-turn consent answers to the MAS Advisor API.
Emit a per-turn telemetry event under share_history: true.
Mark this conversation private and delete prior turn events for the conversation_id.
